basics.name: Nishant Sharma
basics.label: Backend Engineer
basics.summary: Backend-focused developer experienced in building production-grade Node.js/Express systems with secure authentication, modular architecture, aggregation pipelines, and cloud-based media workflows. Deployed real-world APIs on Render and tested live performance, demonstrating reliability, structured API design, and end-to-end ownership.

projects.name: VizTube – Production-Grade Video Platform Backend
projects.description: A scalable backend API for a YouTube-like platform supporting video uploads, playlists, subscriptions, likes, comments, tweets, dashboards, and secure authentication.
highlights: Architected a modular Express backend with dual-token JWT auth, Cloudinary media handling, and schema-level validation.
Implemented playlist management, polymorphic likes, watch history, and creator analytics using structured aggregation pipelines.
Centralized error handling and consistent response formatting for predictable integration.
Deployed on Render with environment-configured runtime and stable uptime for 2+ months.
API handled ~300 requests in 10 seconds without failures during load testing, demonstrating reliability under concurrent traffic.
Performed performance benchmarking using Autocannon, confirming predictable latency and stable behavior under load.

projects.name: Trend Engine – Movie Discovery App
projects.description: Frontend movie discovery app analyzing user interactions to rank trending content.
highlights: Built dynamic content ranking logic with real-time UI updates.
Reduced load by 60% using an optimized debounce strategy.
Designed secure authentication and responsive UI for 200+ users.

projects.name: BankEase – Banking System
projects.description: CLI-based banking system built in C++ with full OOP architecture and binary persistence.
highlights: Engineered binary file storage enabling reliable, corruption-free data handling.
Achieved 99.8% operational stability using structured OOP error-handling patterns.
Designed fully encapsulated file I/O modules ensuring consistent data integrity.

achievements.title: Twice Recommended for Indian Air Force (SSB)
achievements.summary: Cleared a 5-day leadership and psychological assessment twice, part of a ~0.1% selection path.
